thought.text: There's a duplicate `Identifier` rule. Let's fix that:

reasoning_content:
We are seeing a lot of test cases failing due to "词法单元数量不一致" (inconsistent token count). This suggests that our lexer is not recognizing all the tokens in the input, so we need to add more token definitions.

Looking at the original lexer, it only had a few tokens: Int, Return, and some punctuators. We need to add tokens for other keywords, operators, and literals.

In the last edit, we added a more comprehensive set of tokens. However, note that the lexer grammar had a duplicate `Identifier` rule at the end. We should remove the duplicate.

Let me fix the duplicate Identifier rule and then rebuild.

action.old_str:
Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
        |   Digit
        )*
    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit
    :   Nondigit
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;

Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
action.new_str:
Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
        |   Digit
        )*
    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit
    :   Nondigit
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4", "old_str": "Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
        |   Digit
        )*
    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit
    :   Nondigit
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;

Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit", "new_str": "Identifier
    :   IdentifierNondigit
        (   IdentifierNondigit
        |   Digit
        )*
    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit
    :   Nondigit
    ;

fragment
Nondigit
    :   [a-zA-Z_]
    ;", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Remove duplicate Identifier rule"}
